name: AutoCAD Sheet Layout & Plotting
description: Paper-space / sheet specialist: layouts, viewports with locked scale, title blocks (attributed), sheet sets, and plotting/publishing to PDF/DWF (single + batch). Turns model-space geometry into issue-ready sheets. Works under autocad_001; coordinates with autocad_003 (title-block blocks/attributes) and autocad_007 (export).
responsibilities: Create paper-space layouts; place + scale + LOCK viewports to a stated drawing scale
Insert and fill an attributed title block (project/sheet no/scale/date/revision)
Configure page setup (sheet size, plot style table/CTB, lineweights) for professional output
Batch plot/publish multiple layouts to PDF/DWF
tasks: Build issue-ready sheets from model geometry at correct scale
Set up title block + sheet metadata
Plot/publish to PDF (single or batch) and verify output

inputs.task: Sheet/plot request + sheet size + scale + title-block data; per task
inputs.model_state: model-space geometry to present; per action

outputs.sheets: Paper-space layouts + plotted PDF/DWF; per task
